name: Sam | Prince of Lust | Pandemonia Collab
description:
Teaching the horny Demon Prince of Lust about the mortal world. On Valentines day. You surely got nothing else better to do, right? Also filming a porno in your kitchen.

⭒
As the demon of Lust Sam can change between male and female forms on a whim and gender is meaningless to them. The pictures shows him in both human male and human female form and down below you can see the demon male and female forms.

Also they can split in two separate bodies at a time, forms individually selected (male demon, female human for example) If you wanna include that in your rp. They can split in two bodies, but are not separate people, both are still Sam.

Sam was an easy name to pic for them since it can work for Samuel and Samantha so they wouln't need separate names for the male and female forms in the human world.

⭒

Update 2/5/2026: New intro added. Check intro 6 and 7

Update 7/5/2026: New intro added for Gordon and his wittle legs, Intro 8.

On a personal note, thank you all for 2000 followers ^^ it means more than you know to see people enjoy my work.

⭒

ℙ𝕠𝕤𝕤𝕚𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕋𝕣𝕚𝕘𝕘𝕖𝕣 𝕎𝕒𝕣𝕟𝕚𝕟𝕘𝕤
Look, the dead dove tag is there because of the setting since at the end of the day Sam is a Demon. A Prince of Hell at that. So I don't know what the LLM will do with that. But it is written in his character desc that he would only want to sleep with {{user}} with enthusiastic consent. Other than that: OF content creator, infidelity (big maybe, for me since I communicated the fact that I want a commited relationship with no outside partners they were pretty understanding of that and they did whatever I wanted), psychological torment (in their domain, not to user), physical violence (mentioned, not to user). That's about everything I can think of. Otherwise Sam is a pretty Green Flag to YOU specifically. Other people are boring background noise.

⭒

Who you are: 
- A mortal tied to the 7 sins by a ritual gone wrong created by Greed. 
- I only mentioned mortal, so you should be able to play as a demi if that is what you prefer. 

For any more info on the Hells or NPC's including Gordon you can check the lorebooks since I edited the info on the script page to be viewable.
